DISCOVERY 302, MAR-11-2026 RE: MOTION FOR AN ORDER GRANTING EARLY DISCOVERY AND RELATED ORDERS. THE SUBJECT MATTER IS DISCUSSED, SPECIFICALLY THAT THE MATTER HAS BEEN SET FOR HEARING TO CONFIRM A MODIFIED TENTATIVE RULING TO INCLUDE LANGUAGE AS SPECIFIED IN COUNSEL'S NOTICE OF CONTEST TO THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING. AT THE CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS MODIFIED TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER GRANTING EARLY DISCOVERY AND RELATED ORDERS IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: R. WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ) ***AFTER HEARING: AN ORDER IS EXECUTED.
